title: Milk Chocolate Covered Raisins (1kg)
description: Product description Milk Chocolate Covered Raisins (1kg) Ingredients Milk Chocolate (51%) (Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Dried Skimmed MILK, Cocoa Mass, Whey Powder (MILK), MILK Sugar, Butter Oil (MILK), Emulsifiers (SOYA Lecithins, Lecitihins), Flavouring), Raisins (46%), Sunflower Oil, Glazing Agents (Acacia Gum, Shellac), Sugar, Glucose Syrup. Milk Chocolate Contains: Cocoa Solids 25% Minimum, Milk Solids 14% Minimum. May contain PEANUTS and TREE NUTS. For allergens please see ingredients listed in CAPITALS. Our sweets are packed in an environment that handles WHEAT, GLUTEN, SOYA, MILK, PEANUTS and NUTS. Not suitable for children under 4 due to small parts which may cause a choking hazard. Nutritional Information Per 100g (Typical Values): Energy: 1804KJ 429 Kcal Fat: 17.2g Of Which Saturates: 10.8g Carbohydrates: 63.8g Of Which Sugars: 63.3g Fibre: 1.7g Protein: 4.8g Salt: 0.2g Whilst every effort has been taken to ensure the accuracy of the product information provided, products and their ingredients may change. You are advised to always read the product label for ingredients, nutrition, dietary claims and allergens. Sweets and Candy are unable to accept liability for any incorrect information. You can contact us at any point if you need any assistance with ingredients. Directions Serve in handfuls with other chocolate sweets. Serving size: 100g (approx. 6.55 pieces). See more
